LanguageData.FB_GastricAcidSpewer.label: gastric acid spewer
LanguageData.FB_GastricAcidSpewer.description: A digestive organ that spreads gastric acid nearby. Organic bodies and food left in the connected acid pool slowly feed the hemogel network.
LanguageData.FB_GastricAcidSpewerEmbryo.label: gastric acid spewer embryo
LanguageData.FB_GastricAcidSpewerEmbryo.description: An immature digestive organ that will mature into a gastric acid spewer.
